sourcesContent: import { Component } from '@angular/core'; import { Course } from './shared/models/course.interface'; @Component({ selector: 'app-root', templateUrl: './app.component.html', styleUrls: ['./app.component.scss'] }) export class AppComponent { title = 'courses-app'; username = 'Harry Potter'; //placehoder for testing purposes loginBtnText = 'Logout'; //placeholder for testing purposes // sample course for testing course-info component sampleCourse: Course = { id: '12345', title: 'Angular Fundamentals', description: "Angular is the best front-end framework!", creationDate: new Date, duration: 200, authors: ['Tsvetelin Naydenov', 'Rustam Levkovsky'] } }
